mano_cua.result_summary: 测量提示tooltip在三种场景下均未显示：1) 绘制圆形完成后无测量tooltip；2) 编辑圆形退出编辑模式后无测量tooltip；3) 鼠标悬停在圆形上无hover tooltip。成功执行了圆形绘制、编辑模式进入/退出、拖拽调整大小等操作，但测量提示系统未被正确启用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Clicking on the map didn't show any tooltip or popup. No measurement tooltip is visible on the circle. Testing confirmed measurement tooltip not displaying in all three scenarios: after drawing, after editing, and on hover.
